title: Create an incident room from related cross-module signals
given: A user has view access to Control Tower, WMS, invoice audit, API Hub, or Twin risk signals with open exceptions.
when: The user selects related signals and creates an incident room.
then: The assistant persists an AssistantExceptionIncident with severity, blast radius, linked objects, timeline, playbook, and customer-safe communication draft.

title: Only show incident evidence from modules the user can view
given: A user lacks one or more operational module grants.
then: Signals from missing grants are excluded before incident creation, and the UI shows the accessible module list.

title: Queue recovery actions and close only with root-cause notes
given: An incident room has a playbook and communication drafts.
when: The user queues the playbook and later closes the incident.
then: An assistant action queue item is created before recovery/communication, and closure requires root-cause notes with audit history.
